chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-87 of 2026. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on M.A No.289/26. For orders on office objections. For orders on M.A No. 290/26. For hearing of main case. 26.01.2026. Syed Sajjad Ali Shah, Advocate for Petitioners alongwith Petitioners. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. ***************************************** 1. Urgency granted. 2to4. Petitioners (Shrimati Khemi and Raju) are present alongwith their counsel. The Petitioners submit that they have contracted marriage on account of their free will and wish without any pressure or coercion and they intend to live together. The Petitioner No.1 apprehends danger to her life at the hands of her parents as well as registration of false FIR. Learned counsel, therefore, seeks protection to the Petitioners. Learned A.A.G. Sindh after waiving notice of this petition, states that no harassment would be caused to the petitioners and the police officials shall act strictly in accordance with law. Accordingly, instant Petition is disposed of along with listed application(s) with direction to the police officials to act strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to the petitioners. Respondents No.2&3 shall ensure that no FIR is lodged against the petitioner No.2 in respect of petitioner No.1 for her alleged abduction as apprehended by the Petitioners. Let a copy of this order be communicated to respondent No.2/SSP Badin for compliance. JUDGE Ali.
